title: viburnum oblongum var. tengyuehense
intro: Viburnum oblongum var. tengyuehense is a lesser-known species of the viburnum plant, which is a type of flowering shrub native to certain regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum oblongum var. tengyuehense include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
